form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after five months won by 4.5 len Moulins on March 21 over 3500m slow track defeating Mosley carrying 65kg in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished third of 8 runners at Angers on September 22 over 2300m, on slow going 6 len behind Merry Wood carrying 64kg at $4. Can improve on first up performance. Promising jumper worth following up.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only had one start last when he was ran on from midfield; finished eighth of 11 runners at Angers on November 11 over 3400m, slow track; 22 len behind Wutzelito carrying 67kg. Should be improved but place prospects appear best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a break; only had one start last when he was ran on from midfield; finished eighth of 11 runners at Angers on November 11 over 3400m, slow track; 22 len behind Wutzelito carrying 67kg. Should be improved but place prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. At only start last campaign finished fourth of 8 runners at Nantes on June 17 over 3500m, 5.5 len behind Oulala Des Brieres carrying 67.5kg at $10. Likely to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. At only start last campaign finished fourth of 8 runners at Nantes on June 17 over 3500m, 5.5 len behind Oulala Des Brieres carrying 67.5kg at $10. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, finished sixth of 10 runners at Saint Brieuc on February 15 over 3800m, on rain affected going; 48 len behind Mister Banker with 67kg. Second-up finished third of 11 runners at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 3800m, 18 len behind Musistar with 67kg. Rates well. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11.5). Third race start today. Second-up finished third of 11 runners at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 3800m, 18 len behind Musistar with 67kg. Rates well. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Cokoriko out of Bastide has taken a long time to make it to the track. Having his first start today. Not seen on the track yet so hard to assess. Worth watching for a betting push.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 10 months break. Finished off last preparation 4 of 7 runners at Erbray July 6 over 3800m, 13 len behind Etxean Egina carrying 67kg. First ever race start 8 of 12 runners at Durtal June 9 over 2900m, 8 len behind Optimus with 63kg. Needs more time. Prefer others this time.

form.formComment: At debut, finished sixth of 11 runners at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 3800m, 32 len behind Musistar carrying 64kg. Expecting improvement on first up run. Better for that experience and can feature this time.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last preparation 5 of 13 starters at Angers December 6 over 3400m, 8 len behind Midship with 66kg at $9.90. First up last campaign 3 in a small field at Angers November 16 over 2300m, 1.5 len behind Malte De Solzen with 64kg at $4. Expected to play a major role.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, finished fifth of 9 runners at Angers on February 24 over 3400m, slow track; 25 len behind Mention Speciale carrying 64kg at $51. Look for improvement today. Better for that experience and can feature this time.
